Researchers prepare tailored and wearable sensor via 3-D printed UV-curable sacrificial mold Three-dimensional (3-D) printing techniques have the ability to fabricate wearable sensors with customized and complex designs compared with conventional processes. The vat photopolymerization 3-D printing technique exhibits ... Dec 30, 2020 0 38 - Tech Xplore

New York–based photographer Jasmine Clarke got a breath of fresh air during the pandemic when she was invited to experience a weekend at Activation Residency, a Black trans–led artist-residency program in the Catskills. Clarke described her experience as almost reminiscent of childhood, owing to the endless amount of time she had for exploration and rest. - THE CUT

Television and film producer Betsy Beers works alongside Shonda Rhimes producing hit shows including Scandal and Grey’s Anatomy. Most recently is the series Bridgerton, out now on Netflix and highly bingeable, a Regency-era soap filled with gorgeous costumes, gorgeous set pieces, and gorgeous people. Here’s how she gets it done. - THE CUT
